notes: v259 — Security hardening. A full pass over every place the app takes in text from outside — live news headlines, the market data feed, saved-data imports, backups, watchlist and portfolio entries — now cleans that text at the door, so nothing hidden inside a company name, headline or imported file can ever run code in your browser. Live headlines are additionally escaped and their links restricted to real web addresses only. No visible change in day-to-day use; this is protective plumbing. Verified by firing real attack payloads through all 13 entry points — none executed.
